d:["$","$L3",null,{"children":["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-16","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"title":"传输层架构","subtitle":"灵活的通信方式"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6 的实时推送优势和 HTTP 的可靠性。读取使用 WebSocket 保持长连接，写入使用 HTTP POST 确保消息可靠送达。"}]]}],["$","div","WebSocketTransport",{"className":"p-5 rounded-xl border border-[var(--card-border)] 传输，适用于网络环境稳定的场景。全双工通信，延迟最低，但在网络不稳定时可能出现断连。"}]]}],["$","div","SSETransport",{"className":"p-5 rounded-xl border border-[var(--card-border)]
